zh.Lacock Priory, Wanborough, Wiltshire, En: 英國英格蘭維爾爾望別洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ela Longespée於1244年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，她的父親Stephen de Longespée29歲，母親Emmeline Riddlesford22歲。她於1266年與Roger de  Zouche在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1276年7月19日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Ela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from a Hebrew word meaning ‘height’. This was borne by the priest and judge who brought up the future prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 4). It was especially popular among Puritans in the 17th century and has enjoyed a modest revival in recent years. As a Jewish name, it is also a short form of any of numerous names formed with el ‘God’, such as Eliezer , Elijah , and Elisha .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Ela Longespée was born in 1244, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, her father, Stephen de Longespée, was 29 and her mother, Emmeline Riddlesford, was 22. She married Roger de  Zouche in 1266, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died about 19 July 1276, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ela Longespée est née en 1244, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Stephen de Longespée, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Emmeline Riddlesford, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de  Zouche en 1266, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 19 juillet 1276, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ela Longespée 1244 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Stephen de Longespée 29 und ihre Mutter Emmeline Riddlesford 22. Sie hat 1266 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Roger de  Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 19. Juli 1276 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ela Longespée è nata il nel 1244 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Stephen de Longespée, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Emmeline Riddlesford, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Roger de  Zouche nel 1266, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 19 luglio 1276, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ela Longespéeが1244年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Stephen de Longespéeは29歳，母Emmeline Riddlesfordは22歳であった。1266年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでRoger de  Zoucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1276年7月19日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで32歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ela Longespée(이)가 1244년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen de Longespée(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emmeline Riddlesford(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1266년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 Roger de  Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1276년 7월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ela Longespée nasceu em 1244, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Stephen de Longespée, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Emmeline Riddlesford, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de  Zouche em 1266, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 19 de julho de 1276, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ela Longespée родилась в 1244 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Stephen de Longespée было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Emmeline Riddlesford, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de  Zouche в 1266 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 19 июля 1276 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ela Longespée nació en 1244, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Stephen de Longespée, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Emmeline Riddlesford, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Roger de  Zouche en 1266, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 19 de julio de 1276, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
